title: Women & Children Hospital Whitefield | Maternity, Pediatric, NICU Bangalore
description: Best women and children hospital in Whitefield & KR Puram, East Bangalore for maternity care, pregnancy, pediatrics, NICU, fertility, gynecology, scans & diagnostics.

Maternity Packages Fertility Consult Insurance & Cashless Patients Guide Ambulance Care Second Opinion Careers Our Locations Welcome to Miracle Hospital Your Journey to Exceptional Care for Women & Children Begins Here At Miracle Hospital, we’re committed to building a positive, safe, patient-focused culture where your family’s well-being is our utmost priority. What if healthcare for your family wasn’t just a service, but a true partnership? What if world-class expertise in women’s and children’s health felt like the most heartfelt care? Across Bangalore, a profound dream took root. A dream born from the understanding that healing and nurturing should be accessible, affordable, and deeply compassionate for every mother and child. At Miracle Hospital, we dared to build that dream into a reality across our multiple locations. Step into a place where cutting-edge super-specialty care for women and children meets an unwavering commitment to integrity and warmth . From our humble beginnings, we’ve grown into a beacon of trust, fueled by innovation and a single, powerful promise: to put the well-being of your family at the absolute center of everything we do. Industry Best Doctors Our team comprises experienced specialists, many of whom graduated from renowned international medical schools, bringing world-class expertise to your doorstep in Bengaluru. US Care Standards We adhere to international and evidence-based treatment protocols and practices, ensuring you receive care that meets the highest global standards. Our Locations Accessible Care Across Bengaluru We are proud to serve families across Bengaluru with our dedicated facilities, ensuring expert women’s and children’s healthcare is always within your reach. We are committed to providing the highest standard of care, ensuring peace of mind for your family. Dr. Madhusudhan Naidu Obstetrician, Urogynaecologist and Laparoscopic surgeon Dr. Bala R Infertility Specialist, Gynecologist, Reproductive Endocrinologist (Infertility), Obstetrician Dr. Ravi Shankar Swamy Paediatrician and Neonatologist Dr. Roshni Gurnani Paediatrician and Neonatologist Comprehensive Packages Tailored Health Packages for Your Family Imagine peace of mind, knowing your family’s health is fully understood and expertly cared for. At Miracle Hospital, we’ve carefully crafted comprehensive health packages designed with mothers, children, and families in mind. They’re more than just tests; they’re your personalized blueprint for well-being. And here’s the best part: gain this invaluable insight and proactive care at an unbeatable value – almost 50% off! Don’t wait to invest in the healthiest you and your loved ones. Ready to discover the perfect package for your journey? Discover More We are always ready to help you at any time, let’s talk together. Focus on Healing, Not Bills! Cashless Treatment Forget the financial worry. At Miracle Hospital, we believe your journey to recovery and wellness should be smooth, not stressful. That’s why we offer complete cashless facilities, designed for your absolute peace of mind. We’ve partnered directly with all major corporate insurance providers and TPAs, ensuring a hassle-free process from the moment you step in. Just present your insurance details, and let us handle the rest. Your family’s health is our priority, and seamless care is our promise.
